content.text: {"location": "Tokyo, Japan", "start_date": "2025-07-01", "end_date": "2025-07-10", "climate_summary": {"average_high_temp_c": 30.0, "average_low_temp_c": 22.0, "average_precipitation_chance": 55, "typical_conditions": "Hot and humid with frequent cloudy periods and occasional rain showers, typical of the early summer rainy season."}, "summary": "Early July in Tokyo is usually hot and muggy, with a high chance of rain and overcast skies due to the lingering rainy season."}
